name: Chicken Velvet
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Raw chicken breast meat, minced
recipeInstructions:
1. Mince the chicken very finely and add cornstarch and salt to the minced chicken. Mix until combined.
2. Add water to the chicken mixture a few drops at a time until fully absorbed.
3. Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form. Gently fold the chicken mixture into the egg whites.
4. Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a wok over low medium heat for about 2 minutes.
5. Carefully pour the egg white mixture into the hot wok.
6. Reduce heat to low and cook, uncovered, in the wok for about 15 minutes until the omelette is set.
7. Loosen the omelette with a spatula, flip it over, and cook on the reverse side for an additional 10 minutes.
8. Remove from the wok and serve.
NOTE: If desired, the omelette may be served with gravy from the accompanying recipe.
